text_block_list.text:
This is her first shot in the Classic Triple
Crown—the Satsuki Sho. Meisho Doto flies into a
panic.

Her peers T.M. Opera O and Admire Vega are
completely in the zone. On the other hand...

Meisho Doto has her hands full simply adapting
to the atmosphere. She spends most of her time
tailing after T.M. Opera O.
